scripts.dev:api: cd apps/dumpling/backend && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000
scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:stromboli && npm run build:fusilli
scripts.check: npm run check:web && npm run check:stromboli && npm run check:fusilli && npm run check:api
scripts.check:api: cd apps/dumpling/backend && uv run ruff check . && uv run ruff format --check .
scripts.lint: npm run lint:web && npm run lint:api
scripts.lint:api: cd apps/dumpling/backend && uv run ruff check . --fix
scripts.format: npm run format:web && npm run format:api
scripts.format:api: cd apps/dumpling/backend && uv run ruff format .
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/dumpling/backend && uv sync
